scenario: Vertex Foods, a meal-kit retailer, processes 6000 orders per day in Camunda 8.8. A diverging inclusive gateway sends each order into pasta, steak, or salad preparation flows based on a courses variable, with salad chosen as the fallback path taken when no other course is selected by the customer.
question: Which BPMN XML attribute on the inclusiveGateway element identifies the outgoing sequence flow that is taken when no condition is fulfilled?

options.text: The conditionExpression child on the sequence flow with no name is interpreted as the default outgoing sequence flow of the gateway.
The default attribute on the inclusiveGateway element references the id of the outgoing sequence flow used when no condition is fulfilled.
The defaultFlow attribute on the sequence flow marks it as the fallback path of the gateway when no other outgoing condition matches.
The isDefault attribute on the conditionExpression element marks the outgoing sequence flow as the default flow of the inclusive gateway.

a.text: Incorrect. A sequence flow without a conditionExpression is eligible to be the default outgoing flow, but it is the default attribute on the gateway that actually points to it; having no condition is not sufficient on its own.

b.text: Correct. The documented XML places a default attribute on the bpmn:inclusiveGateway element, and that attribute carries the id of the outgoing sequence flow that is taken when no other condition is fulfilled.

c.text: Incorrect. The documented XML does not use a defaultFlow attribute on the sequence flow; the default outgoing flow is declared on the gateway element itself through its default attribute.

d.text: Incorrect. The documented XML does not use an isDefault attribute on a conditionExpression; the default outgoing flow is selected by the default attribute on the inclusiveGateway element.

explanation: The documented XML shows that a diverging inclusive gateway points to its default outgoing sequence flow through the default attribute on bpmn:inclusiveGateway, which carries the id of the chosen fallback sequence flow.
